title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.347 - Federal record-keeping rule to be adopted
text:
302.347.  Federal record-keeping rule to be adopted. — The director of revenue shall adopt the materials incorporated by reference and record-keeping requirements as prescribed in 49 CFR Part 384, or as amended by the Secretary.
(L. 2004 S.B. 1233, et al.) 
Effective 9-30-05
